project.description: Build and deploy the PIC-SURE Gateway container (Phase 1: transparent pass-through in front of WildFly). Builds services/pic-sure-gateway from the pic-sure monorepo reactor. NOTE: git_hash defaults to the long-lived rewrite branch during the gateway migration; change the default to origin/main after the final merge.

hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
#!/bin/bash
CONFIG_DIR="/usr/local/docker-config/gateway" mkdir -p "$CONFIG_DIR"
# Build ONLY the gateway module (+ its reactor deps: platform BOM + libs) from the # pic-sure monorepo. This never builds pic-sure-legacy (quarantined, not aggregated), # so it cannot touch the frozen Java 11 artifact line. docker run --rm \ -v "$DOCKER_CONFIG_DIR/jenkins_home/workspace/$JOB_NAME/:/app" \ -v maven_m2_cache:/root/.m2 \ -w /app \ --platform=linux/amd64 \ maven:3-amazoncorretto-25 \ sh -lc "mvn -B -pl services/pic-sure-gateway -am clean package -DskipTests"
# Step 1: env-file cascade (uploaded param > existing config > generated default) if [ -f gateway.env ]; then echo "A new gateway.env was loaded." cp gateway.env "$CONFIG_DIR/gateway.env" elif [ -f "$CONFIG_DIR/gateway.env" ]; then echo "Using existing gateway.env" else echo "Creating new gateway.env file." { echo "WILDFLY_URL=http://wildfly:8080" echo "SPRING_PROFILE=aio" } > "$CONFIG_DIR/gateway.env" fi
# Step 2: build the runtime image (amazoncorretto:25; the jar comes from the Maven step) docker build -t hms-dbmi/pic-sure-gateway:LATEST services/pic-sure-gateway/
# Step 3: (re)deploy on the picsure network. httpd only routes to it after the # PHASE-1 CUTOVER rules in httpd-vhosts.conf are swapped in, so this deploy is # dark until then. docker stop gateway && docker rm gateway docker run --name=gateway --restart always --network=picsure \ --env-file "$CONFIG_DIR/gateway.env" \ -d hms-dbmi/pic-sure-gateway:LATEST \ || exit 2
# Step 4: smoke -- poll the gateway's own health endpoint from inside the network for i in $(seq 1 12); do if docker run --rm --network=picsure busybox wget -qO- http://gateway:8080/actuator/health >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Gateway is healthy." exit 0 fi sleep 5 done echo "ERROR: gateway did not become healthy within 60s" docker logs --tail 50 gateway exit 2
